zh.Headington, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾希阿丁頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edith D'Oyly於大約1098年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾胡可 諾頓時，她的父親Robert d'Oilly34歲，母親Edith Forne de Greystroke15歲。她於1113年與Gilbert Bassett在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1165年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾希阿丁頓享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾阿炳頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edith D'Oyly于大约1098年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾胡可 諾頓时，她的父亲Robert d'Oilly34岁，母亲Edith Forne de Greystroke15岁。她于1113年与Gilbert Bassett在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1165年在英国英格兰奧可福爾希阿丁頓享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾阿炳頓。

nameMeanings.name: D'Oyly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Olley with fused Old French preposition d' ‘from’.

variants.name: Olley
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of   Oley   2, a habitational name of Norman origin, from any of the five places called Ouilly in Calvados, France.

variants.name: Dilley
meanings: English: possibly a pet form of an unrecorded Old English personal name Dylla, found as the first element in the placenames Dillington (in the former Huntingdonshire) and Dilton (in Wiltshire). The name may sometimes have been confused with Doyley and Dolley (see Olley ).
German: variant of   Dilly   or a surname of French origin, an altered form of   Delay  .
In some cases also an altered form of French   Dilly  .

nameMeanings.name: Edith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Edith D'Oyly was born about 1098, in Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert d'Oilly, was 34 and her mother, Edith Forne de Greystroke, was 15. She married Gilbert Bassett in 1113, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1165, in Headington, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Abingdon, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edith D'Oyly est née environ 1098, à Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert d'Oilly, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Edith Forne de Greystroke, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert Bassett en 1113, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1165, à Headington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Abingdon, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, Unite: Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Edith D'Oyly um 1098 in Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert d'Oilly 34 und ihre Mutter Edith Forne de Greystroke 15. Sie hat 1113 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Gilbert Bassett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1165 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Headington, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Abingdon, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Gilbert Bassett nel 1113, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1165, nel Headington, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Abingdon, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Edith D'Oylyが約1098年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアホーオク ノートンで生まれた時，父Robert d'Oillyは34歳，母Edith Forne de Greystrokeは15歳であった。1113年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでGilbert Bassettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1165年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘディントンで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアビングドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edith D'Oyly(이)가 대략 1098년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 훅 노르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert d'Oilly(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Edith Forne de Greystroke(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1113년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Gilbert Bassett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 헤딩턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 압잉던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edith D'Oyly nasceu aproximadamente 1098, em Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert d'Oilly, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Edith Forne de Greystroke, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert Bassett em 1113, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1165, em Headington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Abingdon, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, Unite: Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edith D'Oyly родилась около 1098 г. в местности хук нортон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert d'Oilly было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Edith Forne de Greystroke, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert Bassett в 1113 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1165 г. в местности хидингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности абингдон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Gilbert Bassett en 1113, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1165, en Headington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Abingdon, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
